scene_input.scene_summary: Abū Jahl dismisses Al-Akhnas' concerns and calls for action
scene_input.key_visual_action: Abū Jahl points a stern finger at Al-Akhnas
scene_input.setting: A gathering in the Quraysh marketplace

schema_output.scene_title: Abū Jahl's Determined Call to Action
schema_output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, p. 138
schema_output.moral_lesson: Standing up for one's beliefs despite opposition

characters.name: Al-Akhnas ibn Sharīq
characters.appearance: medium build, slightly stooped shoulders, wearing a beige thobe and a plain brown woolen cloak with a white cloth head covering

characters.name: Abū Jahl
characters.appearance: medium build, upright posture, wearing a dark brown thobe and a deep red woolen cloak draped over both shoulders

schema_output.narrative_text: Abū Jahl dismissed Al-Akhnas' concerns and called for action, showing his determination to oppose the new message.
schema_output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor storybook illustration, soft warm hand-painted style for ages 6-12. A bustling 7th century Makkah marketplace, with a large stone-built market stall in the center, its awning a vibrant red and white striped fabric. Late afternoon sunlight casts long shadows across the cobblestone street, illuminating the gathered crowd. In the midst of the crowd, two figures stand facing each other. On the left, the central figure seen entirely from behind: medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a flowing beige thobe with a plain brown woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white cloth head covering, one hand extended in a firm gesture of dismissal. On the right, a tall slender man with a stern expression, wearing a dark brown thobe and a deep red woolen cloak with a white cloth head covering, pointing a stern finger at the other, his face set in determination. Soft warm golden light, dynamic and lively mood. Medium close shot at eye level. Warm beige, dark brown, and deep red palette with the deep red cloak as a color anchor. No modern objects, historically accurate 7th century scene.
